# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

# Global Plugins Configurations
plugins:
  - name: cors
    config:
      allowed_origins: ["https://example.com"]
      allow_credentials: true
      max_age: 86400 # seconds

  - name: auth-jwt
    config:
      # TODO: Add your JWT secret key here
      secret_key: "my-secret-key"
      expiration_time: 3600 # seconds

  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      limit: 10
      lookback_window: 3600 # seconds
      sync_rate: true

# Service Plugins Configurations
services:
  - name: my-service
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        enabled: true
        config:
          allowed_origins: ["https://example.com"]
          allow_credentials: true
          max_age: 86400 # seconds

      - name: auth-jwt
        enabled: true
        config:
          # TODO: Add your JWT secret key here
          secret_key: "my-secret-key"
          expiration_time: 3600 # seconds

      - name: rate-limiting
        enabled: true
        config:
          limit: 10
          lookback_window: 3600 # seconds
          sync_rate: true

# Route Plugins Configurations
routes:
  - name: my-route
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        enabled: true
        config:
          allowed_origins: ["https://example.com"]
          allow_credentials: true
          max_age: 86400 # seconds

      - name: auth-jwt
        enabled: true
        config:
          # TODO: Add your JWT secret key here
          secret_key: "my-secret-key"
          expiration_time: 3600 # seconds

      - name: rate-limiting
        enabled: true
        config:
          limit: 10
          lookback_window: 3600 # seconds
          sync_rate: true
